hero.name: Julio Zorro
hero.title: Software Engineer · AI
hero.tagline: I build intelligent systems and the interfaces that make them feel human.

about.label: About
about.heading:
I've debugged firmware at 3am and explained neural nets at 8am.
Both taught me the same thing.
about.bio:
Electronic engineer from Universidad de los Andes. For five years I co-built an AgriTech startup from the ground up — designing weather stations, writing firmware, running the backend, and turning sensor data into irrigation advice real farmers could act on. I also taught at university: programming, circuits, control systems, AI. Watching a student finally get it never gets old.

Now I build conversational AI agents with LangGraph and the interfaces that make them actually useful. I care about the full stack — not because it's impressive, but because that's how good products get made.
about.approach: Hardware taught me that software lives in the real world. I think in systems, not features — which means I catch problems earlier, build fewer things that break, and ship work I'm not embarrassed by.

iot.label: Hardware & IoT
iot.body: Built weather stations and farm software for 5 years at an AgriTech startup. Real sensors, real farmers.

university.label: University
university.body: Professor at Los Andes — programming, AI, circuits. Courses rated among the best.

now.label: Now
now.body: Conversational AI agents and interfaces. Same obsession with usefulness, different medium.

agent.title: Conversational Agent
agent.description: A multi-turn conversational agent built with LangGraph. Memory, tool use, and structured reasoning orchestrated in a single graph.

sinergia.title: Estudio Sinergia
sinergia.description: Marketing site for a creative studio — fast, accessible, and built to convert. Astro's island architecture keeps it near-zero JS by default.

haz.title: HAZ Arquitectura
haz.description: Portfolio and services site for a Bogotá-based architecture firm with 30+ years of experience. Image-first, bilingual-ready.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's build something.
contact.available: Currently available for freelance and full-time opportunities.
